hook.say: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce just got married at Madison Square Garden.
hook.show: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce just got married at Madison Square Garden.

lines.say: The pop star and NFL tight end exchanged vows on July 3rd.
lines.show: The pop star and NFL tight end exchanged vows on July 3rd.

lines.say: But the biggest surprise? Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony.
lines.show: But the biggest surprise? Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony.

lines.say: Billboard confirmed the nuptials, which took place in New York City.
lines.show: Billboard confirmed the nuptials, which took place in New York City.

lines.say: Both wore custom Christian Dior Haute Couture designed by Jonathan Anderson.
lines.show: Both wore custom Christian Dior Haute Couture designed by Jonathan Anderson.

lines.say: Austin Swift was Man of Honor, Jason Kelce the Best Man.
lines.show: Austin Swift was Man of Honor, Jason Kelce the Best Man.

lines.say: The guest list was massive, including Ed Sheeran, Hugh Grant, and Andy Reid.
lines.show: The guest list was massive, including Ed Sheeran, Hugh Grant, and Andy Reid.

lines.say: Even George Kittle didn't know the venue until the last minute.
lines.show: Even George Kittle didn't know the venue until the last minute.

lines.say: The couple used watermarked invitations to prevent leaks.
lines.show: The couple used watermarked invitations to prevent leaks.

lines.say: How long will it take for the wedding photos to drop?
lines.show: How long will it take for the wedding photos to drop?

captions.instagram: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce tied the knot in a star-studded surprise ceremony at Madison Square Garden! Adam Sandler officiated, and the guest list was insane. We need those wedding photos, stat! 📸💍 #TaylorSwift #TravisKelce #TayvisWedding #MadisonSquareGarden #AdamSandler #CelebrityWedding #PopCulture #NFL
captions.facebook: Well, this was unexpected! Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are officially married, and the details are wild. Adam Sandler officiated their Madison Square Garden wedding, with everyone from Ed Sheeran to Hugh Grant in attendance. How do you think they kept it such a secret?

pinterest.title: Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Married! Adam Sandler Officiates MSG Wedding
pinterest.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce surprised everyone with a Madison Square Garden wedding on July 3rd! Adam Sandler officiated the star-studded event, which included guests like Ed Sheeran and Hugh Grant. Get the details on their secret nuptials and custom Dior looks. #TaylorSwift #TravisKelce #Wedding #CelebrityNews

captions.x: SURPRISE! Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are MARRIED! Adam Sandler officiated their Madison Square Garden wedding. The guest list was wild. How long until we see the photos?! 💍 #Tayvis #CelebrityWedding

spoken: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce just got married at Madison Square Garden. The pop star and NFL tight end exchanged vows on July 3rd. But the biggest surprise? Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony. Billboard confirmed the nuptials, which took place in New York City. Both wore custom Christian Dior Haute Couture designed by Jonathan Anderson. Austin Swift was Man of Honor, Jason Kelce the Best Man. The guest list was massive, including Ed Sheeran, Hugh Grant, and Andy Reid. Even George Kittle didn't know the venue until the last minute. The couple used watermarked invitations to prevent leaks. How long will it take for the wedding photos to drop?
